text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 33 

HOP_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Hospital Outpatient Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of Medicare coinsurance and deductible payments in the hospital outpatient 
(HOP) setting for a given year. The total beneficiary payment is calculated as the sum of the beneficiary 
deductible amount and coinsurance amount (variables called NCH_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT and
